persona_json.name: Alex Rivera
goals_jtbd: Align cross-functional teams under shifting priorities
Reduce cognitive load from fragmented tools
scenarios: Abandons task flows after encountering 2 friction points (e.g., conflicting stakeholder inputs + tool incompatibility)
Prioritizes visible progress over perfect solutions when under time pressure
Over-invests in unproven tools during quiet weeks but abandons them during crunch time
